import pytest
from source import knapsack

def test_knapsack_exactly_fills_capacity():
    capacity = 3
    items = [(3, 10), (1, 5)]
    expected_value = 10  # The item with weight 3 and value 10 exactly fills the capacity
    assert knapsack(capacity, items) == expected_value, "The optimal solution should exactly fill the capacity"
